task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite, and an RIS file with 2 entries (ELECTRA and RoBERTa) is at /home/user/Documents/nlp_papers.ris.

Create a new top-level collection named exactly 'NLP Imports' and import /home/user/Documents/nlp_papers.ris so that both imported items end up inside that collection. After completion, the 'NLP Imports' collection must exist and contain at least 2 items, and items titled 'ELECTRA' and 'RoBERTa' must exist in the library. Leave Zotero running.
